# Copilot Instructions — MyWallet

This project uses Expo SDK 54, Expo Router v6, and React Native with the new architecture. Package manager: bun.

Rules:
- use context7
- keep the project well structured and organized
- keep using the same general Ui design and patterns as the existing codebase
- use the same coding style as the existing codebase
- use the same naming conventions as the existing codebase
- use the themes.ts file for colors, fonts, and other design tokens
- use the components folder for reusable components
